mapper.sql: L_SERIAL_NO, L_DATE, L_DAILY_INSTRUCTION_NO, L_FUND_ID, L_BASECOMBI_ID, L_RULE_NO, VC_PORT_CODE, C_NUMERATOR_CODE, C_ASSET_CODE, C_MARKET_ASSET_CODE, C_MARKET_CODE, VC_ASSET_SHTNAME, VC_OBJECT_SHTNAME, VC_RULE_DESCRIBE, C_THRESHOLD_TYPE, C_VOILATE_TYPE, VC_THRESHOD_RULE, EN_VALUE, EN_ADJUST_VALUE, VC_TRIGGER_REMARK
mapper.insert: insert into T_COMP_RTCHECKRES (L_SERIAL_NO, L_DATE, L_DAILY_INSTRUCTION_NO, L_FUND_ID, L_BASECOMBI_ID, L_RULE_NO, VC_PORT_CODE, C_NUMERATOR_CODE, C_ASSET_CODE, C_MARKET_ASSET_CODE, C_MARKET_CODE, VC_ASSET_SHTNAME, VC_OBJECT_SHTNAME, VC_RULE_DESCRIBE, C_THRESHOLD_TYPE, C_VOILATE_TYPE, VC_THRESHOD_RULE, EN_VALUE, EN_ADJUST_VALUE, VC_TRIGGER_REMARK) values (#{lSerialNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lDailyInstructionNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lFundId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lBasecombiId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lRuleNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcPortCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cNumeratorCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cAssetCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cMarketAssetCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cMarketCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcAssetShtname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcObjectShtname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcRuleDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cThresholdType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cVoilateType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcThreshodRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enAdjustValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcTriggerRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into T_COMP_RTCHECKRES (L_SERIAL_NO, L_DATE, L_DAILY_INSTRUCTION_NO, L_FUND_ID, L_BASECOMBI_ID, L_RULE_NO, VC_PORT_CODE, C_NUMERATOR_CODE, C_ASSET_CODE, C_MARKET_ASSET_CODE, C_MARKET_CODE, VC_ASSET_SHTNAME, VC_OBJECT_SHTNAME, VC_RULE_DESCRIBE, C_THRESHOLD_TYPE, C_VOILATE_TYPE, VC_THRESHOD_RULE, EN_VALUE, EN_ADJUST_VALUE, VC_TRIGGER_REMARK)
(select #{item.lSerialNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lDailyInstructionNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lFundId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lBasecombiId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lRuleNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.vcPortCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cNumeratorCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cAssetCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cMarketAssetCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cMarketCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.vcAssetShtname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.vcObjectShtname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.vcRuleDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.cThresholdType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cVoilateType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.vcThreshodRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.enValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.enAdjustValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.vcTriggerRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual)
